personal_info.name: Nguyễn Thảo Linh [cite: 14]
personal_info.headline: Sinh viên năm 3 ngành Kinh tế Quốc tế chất lượng cao với định hướng phát triển trong lĩnh vực Business Analyst. [cite: 15]
personal_info.introduction: I am a third-year student in the Advanced Program in International Economics, with a career orientation toward Business Analysis. [cite: 20] I have a strong academic foundation in economics, good English proficiency, and an interest in Business Analysis, Market Research, and Business Development. [cite: 21] Through academic activities, club involvement, teaching-related roles, and student projects, I have developed analytical thinking, communication skills, and the ability to work with different stakeholders. [cite: 22] I am currently seeking job or internship opportunities to further develop my professional skills and gain practical experience in a business environment. [cite: 23]
